jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at SIDBI
jsonLd.description:
We at SIDBI are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SIDBI:
SIDBI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
